message: Removed console statements from recommendation-generator.ts (1 console.warn) and akasha-core.ts (7 console.warn across 5 pilares: Cabala, Astrologia, Tantra, Odu, I-Ching). cli.ts had no debug console statements to remove: 3 console.error are real errors (kept per rule), 3 console.log are user-facing CLI output for printHelp() and version display (kept as functional output). Both edited files typecheck clean. Pre-existing typecheck errors in packages/core-iching/ are unrelated.

files_skipped.reason: No debug console statements. console.error (3x) are real errors; console.log (3x) are user-facing CLI output (printHelp + version display).
